definition: document providing information about the essential physical, safety-related, toxicological and ecological characteristics and recommendations for a safe handling concerning storage, transportation and use of an item containing chemical substances and mixtures

definition_ml.en: document providing information about the essential physical, safety-related, toxicological and ecological characteristics and recommendations for a safe handling concerning storage, transportation and use of an item containing chemical substances and mixtures
definition_ml.de: Dokument, das Informationen über essentielle physikalische, sicherheitsrelevante, toxologische und ökologische Eigenschaften zur Verfügung stellt, um sichere Handhabung bei Lagerung, Transport und Benutzung eines Geräts zu gewährleisten, das chemische Substanzen und Gemische enthält

note: Safety data sheets may be requested by national or regional laws

note_ml.en: Safety data sheets may be requested by national or regional laws
note_ml.de: Sicherheitsdatenblätter können von nationalen oder regionalen Gesetzen gefordert sein.

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: document providing information about the essential physical, safety-related, toxicological and ecological characteristics and recommendations for a safe handling concerning storage, transportation and use of an item containing chemical substances and mixtures
